reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module modifies the initramfs and requires booting with the fips=1 kernel parameter. On an already installed RHEL 9 system this is not supported and can render the system unbootable or cause cryptographic failures, making remediation high risk.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; FIPS mode activation; kernel boot parameter change; initramfs rebuild; potential boot failure; cryptographic service disruption
